summary: Comprehensive testing of Onboarding, Premium, Subscription, and Stripe Payment features completed successfully. All 8 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified via Playwright testing.

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on page load and can block interactions if not dismissed - consider showing once per session

passed_tests: Onboarding Step 1: Age input field accepts valid ages (18-55)
Onboarding Step 1: Age validation shows error for invalid ages (below 18 or above 55)
Onboarding Step 2: Pregnancy weeks input accepts valid weeks (1-42)
Onboarding Step 2: Pregnancy weeks validation shows error for invalid weeks
Onboarding Step 2: Trimester display correctly shows First/Second/Third Trimester based on weeks
Onboarding Step 3: Dietary considerations can be selected/deselected
Onboarding Step 3: Skip option available for dietary step
User data persisted to localStorage after onboarding completion
Settings page displays user profile (Age: 28, Week 16, Second Trimester)
Settings page displays dietary restrictions (vegetarian, dairy-free)
Settings page shows 'Upgrade to Premium' link with $0.99 pricing
Premium page displays $0.99 pricing prominently
Premium page shows 'One-time payment for entire pregnancy' messaging
Premium page has feature comparison table (Free vs Premium)
Premium page subscribe button navigates to Subscribe page
Subscribe page displays order summary with $0.99 total
Subscribe page shows Stripe security messaging
Subscribe page checkout button redirects to Stripe Checkout (checkout.stripe.com)
Stripe Checkout page shows US$0.99 payment amount
POST /api/payments/checkout - Creates Stripe checkout session with valid URL and session_id
POST /api/payments/checkout - Works for guest users without user_id
POST /api/payments/checkout - Validates required origin_url field (422 error)
GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} - Returns valid session status (open/unpaid)
GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} - Returns 500 for invalid session IDs
Payment price verified as exactly $0.99 (99 cents)
Payment transaction recorded in MongoDB with correct fields
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is clean with proper separation of concerns
Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library correctly
Payment transactions are properly stored in MongoDB with pending/paid status tracking
localStorage persistence for user data is implemented correctly
Trimester calculation logic is accurate (weeks 1-12 = T1, 13-27 = T2, 28-42 = T3)
test_credentials: No credentials needed - localStorage-based user management
seed_data_creation: Test payment transactions created with TEST_ prefix user_ids during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding, Premium, and Payment features fully tested. Stripe integration working in test/sandbox mode (sk_test_emergent key). Payment endpoints: POST /api/payments/checkout creates checkout session, GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} retrieves status. MongoDB collection: payment_transactions. User data stored in localStorage under key 'whattoeat_user'. Disclaimer modal shows on app load - need to click 'I Understand' button to dismiss.

features_verified.onboarding_age_step: Working - Input validation (18-55), error messages displayed
features_verified.onboarding_pregnancy_step: Working - Input validation (1-42), trimester calculation correct
features_verified.localStorage_persistence: Working - User data saved and retrieved correctly
features_verified.settings_profile_display: Working - Shows age, weeks, trimester, dietary restrictions
features_verified.premium_feature_comparison: Working - Free vs Premium table displayed
features_verified.subscribe_page: Working - Order summary, Stripe checkout button
features_verified.payment_status_api: Working - Returns session status from Stripe
features_verified.mongodb_transaction_storage: Working - Transactions stored with all required fields
